tasks.label: git-commit-push
tasks.command:
cd /workspaces/Nexus-HEMS-Dash && git add -A && git commit -m 'feat(protocols): real protocol implementations (mock → production)

Victron: mqtt.js lazy-load + MQTT-over-WebSocket to Venus OS dbus-mqtt
  - Auto-detect portalId, D-Bus path mapping, keepalive R/ reads
  - Legacy Node-RED WebSocket fallback preserved
Modbus: SunSpec model auto-discovery + scale factor support
  - REST bridge with auth token, register write mapping
  - Probe available models (101-103, 124, 160, 201-204)
KNX: Dual transport (WebSocket + MQTT) + ETS import
  - setRoomConfigs/getRoomConfigs for Settings UI
  - Initial state request on connect, MQTT topic parsing
OCPP: Correlated JSON-RPC (pending call map + 30s timeout)
  - Security profiles 0-3, ISO 15118 Plug & Charge
  - §14a EnWG grid curtailment via ChargingStationMaxProfile
  - Heartbeat + Authorize handler, proper BootNotification
EEBUS: Server-side mDNS discovery + SKI pairing
  - /api/eebus/discover and /api/eebus/pair Express endpoints
  - Async pairDeviceAsync, configurable serverBaseUrl
  - Replaced mock devices with real server-side discovery
Store: Updated adapter factory with typed config classes
Deps: Added mqtt ^5.12.2
i18n: 21 new adapter/protocol keys (EN + DE)' && git push
